do_not_touch: Implementation scope limited to app/services and spec
targets.acceptance_signal: The last step is a pure runtime gate that explicitly verifies both the new service spec and the existing regression suite with concrete commands and pass/fail criteria.

change_scope: Verification wording for secret-free local execution
do_not_touch: No real S3 integration and no ENV wiring
targets.acceptance_signal: At least one explicit command runs the relevant checks with AWS env vars unset and yields an observable green signal without live S3.

global_constraints: Do not expand scope beyond one service object and its specs.
Do not rewrite already-passing delta descriptions without evidence.
Do not introduce config/application.rb or initializer changes because active spec forbids bootstrap expansion.
